summary: Verified all bug fixes for Adhish Kacker's portfolio. 66/66 frontend checks PASS. PDF URLs (5) all return HTTP 200 with content-type application/pdf. Product Decks (Hybrid, VOX) and Case Studies (IPL-2025, Valentines) buttons are now proper <a> tags with valid hrefs and target='_blank'. Resume and hero-cta-resume point to correct CV PDF. Expertise has 10 cards + tools-subsection with 13 chips. Hero has 5 stat cards including '10+ Webinars & Podcasts'. Metrics section has 7 tiles including 'Webinars & Podcasts' and no longer contains '2.5x' or 'Engagement Growth'. Theme toggle works on new sections. Backend /api/ returns 200.
verified_assertions: deck-view-hybrid, deck-download-hybrid: <a> with href to Hybrid%20.pdf, target=_blank
deck-view-vox, deck-download-vox: <a> with href to VOX%20.pdf, target=_blank
case-download-ipl-2025: <a> with href to b9vfqbuq_IPL.pdf, target=_blank
case-download-valentines: <a> with href to x2t52gcl_Valentines%20.pdf, target=_blank
resume-view, resume-download: <a> with href to lljpr7go_Adhish_Kacker_Resume.pdf, target=_blank
hero-cta-resume: <a> with href to Adhish_Kacker_Resume.pdf, target=_blank
10 expertise cards with all expected titles (expertise-card-0 .. expertise-card-9)
tools-subsection present with exactly 13 chips (tool-0 .. tool-12) and expected names
Hero shows 5 stat cards including '10+ Webinars & Podcasts'
Metrics has 7 tiles, contains 'Webinars & Podcasts', does NOT contain '2.5x' or 'Engagement Growth'
Theme toggle switches html class and Product Decks + Tools sections remain visible in dark mode
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Expertise.jsx imports Wrench icon but ICONS map doesn't expose it (only used inline for tools header), which is fine. No issues found.
Minor: Hero Pipeline value uses '~$2M+' in HERO_STATS but Metrics uses prefix '~$' + value 2 + suffix 'M+' — both render the same. Consistent.
No code smell or refactor needed for this iteration. Files are well under size limits and use data-testid properly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All bug fixes from this iteration verified. PDF anchors render as proper <a target=_blank> with valid CDN URLs returning application/pdf. Expertise (10) + Tools (13) and Hero (5 stats) + Metrics (7 tiles, no 2.5x) all correct. Contact form has been removed; Contact section now contains only LinkedIn + email cards (not re-tested per main agent instruction). Theme toggle works on new sections. Backend /api/ healthy.
